name: Zebrina Wood Nightstand with Drawer Natural - Threshold™: Bohemian Style, Arched Design, Square Shape, Stained Finish
description:
Add traditional charm to your home with this Zebrina Wood Nightstand with Drawer from Threshold™. This square nightstand showcases a wooden construction in a distressed finish for adding classic appeal to your space. The curved corners add extra style while the built-in drawer and shelf offer ample space for your lamp, books and more.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Dimensions
Overall Height: 23 inches
Overall Width: 24 inches
Depth of top panel: 15.75 inches
Depth of handle: 0.75 inches
Width of drawer front panel: 20.9 inches
Width of drawer box: 20 inches
Height of drawer box: 3.1 inches
Height of drawer front: 4.9 inches
Depth of drawer box: 11.8 inches
Distance from floor to bottom panel: 4 inches
